channel.title: Procedural Generation on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Procedural Generation on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Procedural vs. Handmade Content
item.description: Hey everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about procedural versus handmade content in games.

item.title: Arcanum Prototypes & Structures
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about prototypes and structures in Arcanum.

item.title: Arcanum's Procedural Terrain Generation
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I wanted to talk about arcanum’s procedural terrain generation system, gotten some questions about this for years.
